name: FFAI Provider
description: Free-tier AI key-pooling proxy with multi-provider model discovery

baseUrl.description: FFAI server URL (e.g., http://127.0.0.1:8010). Overridden by the FFAI_URL environment variable.

favorites.description: Model IDs to include in the ffai-favorites provider group. The first entry is promoted to the default model during onboarding.

compatSync.description: Temporary workaround: run a one-shot catalog sync into openclaw.json at gateway start. Needed until upstream OpenClaw ships the fix for providerDiscoveryEntry plugins. Leave true unless you know your host already has the fix.

baseUrl.label: FFAI Server URL
baseUrl.help: URL of your FFAI key-pooling proxy (default: http://127.0.0.1:8010). FFAI_URL env var takes precedence.

favorites.label: Favorite Models
favorites.help: List of model IDs to group under ffai-favorites for quick access in /models. Leave empty to see all discovered models ungrouped.

compatSync.label: Compatibility Sync
compatSync.help: Workaround for upstream OpenClaw packaging bug. Leave enabled for now; disable once your openclaw host ships the fix for providerDiscoveryEntry plugins.
